author: dns-error-impl
content: Completed: DNS error exemption from failure_count in browser_manager.py. is_dns_error predicate gates only failure_count increment (not restart_required). All 5 ACs pass: scale test (110 domains, failure_limit=5), integration test (website.invalid → dnsNotFound in crawl_history), and predicate unit tests. Commit 1c764e7.
